summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected. Planned non-mutating outcomes for the 10 listed PRs: 3 security-sensitive refs routed to central security handling and 7 open non-security PRs kept for independent or related maintainer follow-up; no close, merge, or fix actions planned.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR with distinct plugin metadata scope; keep for normal review rather than dedupe, close, merge, or fix automation.
Related refreshed feature PR with substantial scope and maintainer-review needs; keep non-mutating.
Distinct channel delivery fix with useful tests but proof remains blocked; no dedupe or close action is justified.
Security-boundary-sensitive compaction/system-prompt behavior is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Abort trigger attribution around gateway/runner control flow is marked security-sensitive by the preflight artifact, so it must be handled by central security review only.
Distinct channel/session-state PR with unresolved review-bot findings and proof failures; keep non-mutating for author or maintainer follow-up.
Related refreshed port of a closed contributor PR; keep open for normal maintainer review, with no closure or merge action in this plan shard.
Related but not duplicate; keep non-mutating because the useful Telegram timeout idea is distinct while the current branch is broad and not landable.
Sensitive media/session context contamination is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and must route to central security handling.
Related documentation follow-up to a merged fix, but failing checks and maintainer-review status block any merge recommendation.
